title: Document Decomposer Endpoint
key_findings: Existing v2 webhook (port 8847) currently only saves to inbox without triggering decomposer
Decomposer expects local files with --doc and --jd flags
Existing webhook patterns (recall-webhook, fathom-webhook) use FastAPI with SQLite logging
Next available webhook port is 8848 per PORT_REGISTRY.md
architecture_decisions: Use port 8848 for new decomposer endpoint (keep v2 webhook as fallback)
Framework: FastAPI (matches existing N5 webhook patterns)
Auth: Bearer token (start simple, upgrade to Svix if needed)
Processing: Synchronous initially (add async if timeouts become issue)

payload_schema.document_fields: Either text or URL for both careerspan_doc and job_description

processing_flow: 3. Fetch documents from URLs if provided
7. Respond with success details and send notification
